original: the

One of the naleen brothers holds the left flank of the jungle against you and Azra. He appears genuinely irritated by your presence, his ears flat back against his jet-black hair. His claws and fangs are clearly visible, brandished in an attempt to cow you into submission by threat alone. Behind him, his tail swishes angrily. A satchel bounces on his far hip, and judging by the way he holds it, he wants to keep it far from your reach.
The naleen slides out of the way of your attack, serpentine body coiling upon itself with serpentine speed.
You duck out of the way!
{var0}.getCombatName()+" ducks out of the way.
context: <<POS:01267741>> <<VARS:var0=e>> combatAppend(e.getCombatName()+" ducks out of the way.")

original: The strike leaves bloody furrows in her flesh. Azra is bleeding!
The strike leaves bloody furrows in your flesh. You’re bleeding!
You hop over it!
Azra dodges the attack!
It smacks off your [pc.leg]. It hurts, but you’re not going down that easy.
It strikes Azra’s leg, but to little effect.
The world spins 90 degrees as you’re tripped! Ouch!
Losing her footing, she falls to the floor--Azra is tripped!
your direction
Azra’s direction
. It catches on the smallest eddy and breeze, spreading into a stinging white cloud.
You avoid getting any in your eyes.
Azra avoids getting any in her eyes.
Some of it gets in your eyes! You are blinded!
Some gets in Azra’s eyes. She is blinded!
